description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to master and actions branches and on pull requests to master. Run two ubuntu-latest jobs: test-big-endian with a matrix of Python 2.7 and 3.7, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing with pip, and running test.sh; and test-little-endian, checking out the code, running on a s390x Ubuntu 20.04 architecture with run-on-arch-action, installing Python and NumPy, verifying the environment, and running test.sh with Python 3.
